title: Sky Inventory Background
description: a nice sky background for the inside of your inventory no mods required
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0716137f2eafa837a0e27738635c98715497120.png)
# Sky Inventory Background

### about
a simple texture pack which stylizes the inventory gui
### terms of use
- do not plagiarise this pack
- (optional)if you are making a social media post eg. youtube video please use the card version and leave original download link
- do not give alternitive download links
